# Milkcrate

> Browse vinyl records like a record store. Curated Discogs storefronts for independent record shops.

Milkcrate uses Ruby on Rails with Inertia.js and React. Store pages are server-rendered with JSON-LD structured data for machine consumption.

## Stores

- [Philadelphia Music](/philadelphiamusic): 90,000+ vinyl records across Electronic, Rock, Jazz
- [Super Micah](/supermicah): Techno and electronic vinyl specialist
- [Browse all stores](/explore)

## Info

- Store pages include JSON-LD structured data (LocalBusiness, ItemList, BreadcrumbList) for search engines and AI crawlers
- All public pages are server-rendered via Inertia SSR — no JavaScript required for crawlers
- sitemap.xml available at /sitemap.xml.gz
